faqs.question: Can I use AI to handle grouping customer comments into themes and next actions without losing the core detail?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you choose the tool that matches the input type and then review the output yourself. Notion AI is the best starting point, NotebookLM is the strongest second choice, and Airtable is the safer fallback when you need a different balance of speed and control.

faqs.question: Which AI tool is better when I need source checking?
faqs.answer: NotebookLM is usually the better choice when source checking matters, while Notion AI is stronger when the job starts with a known set of files or notes.

faqs.question: Is Notion AI better than NotebookLM for this workflow?
faqs.answer: Notion AI is better when you want the most direct match for the main input; NotebookLM is better when the workflow changes enough to justify a different tool.

faqs.question: What should I avoid before I share the result?
faqs.answer: Avoid sharing the first draft until you have checked facts, tone, and any missing context. Use Airtable as a helper, not a replacement for review.
